name: Rose Gold Birthday Cake
desc: A dreamy rose gold birthday cake with floral fondant accents and gold leaf decoration. Perfect for milestone birthdays.

name: Rainbow Theme Cake
desc: Colourful rainbow-layered cake with white cloud frosting. Loved by kids and adults alike!

name: White Elegance Wedding Tier
desc: A classic 3-tier white wedding cake with delicate sugar flowers and pearl detailing. Timeless and elegant.

name: Photo Print Cake
desc: Personalised edible photo print cake — send us any photo and we'll bake your memory onto a cake!

name: Floral Fondant Cake
desc: Hand-sculpted fondant roses in soft pinks and whites. Ideal for birthdays, anniversaries and bridal showers.

name: Mini Cupcake Box (12)
desc: Box of 12 beautifully frosted mini cupcakes, perfect for parties, gifting, and office celebrations.
